channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: GPT is far likelier than other AI models to fabricate quotes by public figures, our analysis shows
item.description: Large language models typically perform so similarly that their differences can be measured by millimeters. But in some scenarios, these models are separated by miles.
item.dc:creator: Andrew Thompson, Fast Company

item.title: Sophia, a famous robot and global icon of AI, wins hearts at Zimbabwe's innovation fair
item.description: Sophia, a world-renowned robot, has been the center of attention at an Artificial Intelligence and Innovation fair in Zimbabwe this week.
item.dc:creator: By Farai Mutsaka, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Feds propose protection for giant salamanders devastated by Hurricane Helene
item.description: A giant salamander that evolved on the supercontinent Pangaea and outlived the dinosaurs has been proposed for federal protection by the U.S. Fish and Wildlife Service.
item.dc:creator: Brittany Peterson, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Data and AI Talent: A National Security Imperative
item.description: The need for a dedicated public sector data and AI workforce amid global uncertainty and fierce talent competition.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network

item.title: Heading north for the winter? Prepare your EV with these tips
item.description: New research from AAA reveals that when temperatures dip to 20 degrees Fahrenheit, and the HVAC system is used to heat the inside of the vehicle, the average driving range of an EV decreases by 41 percent.
item.dc:creator: Mark Maynard, The Mercury News

item.title: Microsoft introduces Phi-4, an AI model for advanced reasoning tasks
item.description: Microsoft has announced Phi-4 — a new AI model with 14 billion parameters — designed for complex reasoning tasks, including mathematics. Phi-4 excels in areas such as STEM question-answering and advanced problem-solving, surpassing similar models in performance.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: What is data science? Transforming data into value
item.description: What is data science? Data science is a method to glean insights from structured and unstructured data using approaches ranging from statistical analysis to machine learning (ML).
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Python: The Fastest-Growing and Most Popular Language of 2024
item.description: Discover the latest developments in Python, including a clever hack of a popular AI library, a new package management tool, and tips for making your programs faster.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Microsoft .NET Community Toolkit backs partial properties
item.description: Microsoft has released .NET Community Toolkit 8.4, with support for partial properties in MVVM Toolkit source generators as well as new MVVM Toolkit diagnostic analyzers. The update was unveiled December 12. Source code for the .NET Community Toolkit can be found on GitHub.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Addressing tech skills shortages through Australia’s correctional facilities
item.description: Australian CIOs are being called to support a groundbreaking initiative that is transforming lives and addressing critical talent shortages in the technology sector.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: San Jose, SJSU announce collaboration with NVIDIA to further workforce development, AI innovation
item.description: Nvidia signed two memorandums of understanding on Thursday -- including he first workforce pipeline initiative in the company’s history with a city government -- that offer training programs to both entities to upskill the workforce and drive innovation in San Jose.
item.dc:creator: Devan Patel, The Mercury News

item.title: Trump offers support for dockworkers union by saying ports shouldn’t install more automated systems
item.description: The International Longshoremen’s Association has until Jan. 15 to negotiate a new contract with the U.S. Maritime Alliance, which represents ports and shipping companies.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: DoorDash steps up driver ID checks after traffic safety complaints
item.description: DoorDash will require its drivers to verify their identities more often as part of a larger effort to crack down on unauthorized account sharing. DoorDash has been under pressure to ensure its drivers are operating legally.
item.dc:creator: DEE-ANN DURBIN, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Trump says he's meeting with Bezos next week
item.description: President-elect Trump will meet next week with Amazon founder and Washington Post owner Jeff Bezos next week, Trump said during a visit to the New York Stock Exchange. Trump rang the opening bell at the stock exchange then walked the floor to greet traders.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, The Hill

item.title: How to keep your holiday shopping a secret on Amazon
item.description: Kurt "CyberGuy" Knutsson explains how to keep your online Amazon gift purchases a secret from loved ones or friends this holiday season.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Meta donated $1M to Trump inaugural fund after Zuckerberg met with president-elect
item.description: Meta donated $1 million to President-elect Trump's inaugural fund, the company confirmed to The Hill on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Democratic rep sees ‘nontrivial chance’ China using drones in US
item.description: Rep. Raja Krishnamoorthi (D-Ill.) weighed in on questions swirling around China's potential use of drones against the U.S., claiming the chance was "nontrivial.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, The Hill

item.title: Google’s AI coding entry with Jules signals tougher competition in coding tools
item.description: Google has made a significant entry into the competitive AI coding tools market with Jules, an experimental coding assistant aimed at enhancing developer workflows and challenging established tools like GitHub Copilot and Amazon Q Developer.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: InfoWorld’s 2024 Technology of the Year Award winners
item.description: Artificial intelligence, including generative AI, continues to evolve rapidly across enterprise organizations, despite a lot of heavy lifting still required of software developers and data scientists.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: How social media unspooled Luigi Mangione’s life after UnitedHealthcare CEO’s murder
item.description: The murder of UnitedHealthcare CEO Brian Thompson last Wednesday sparked a five-day manhunt for the mysterious killer, who left behind irresistible clues like a hidden message on bullet casings and a backpack filled with Monopoly money.
item.dc:creator: Joe Berkowitz, Fast Company

item.title: Google Unveils Second Generation of Gemini Frontier Models
item.description: Google introduces Gemini 2.0, a new generation of its frontier models designed to power AI agents with greater autonomy and multimodal capabilities.
item.dc:creator: Mark Sullivan, Fast Company

item.title: Dozens of lawmakers victims of sexually explicit deepfakes: Report
item.description: More than two dozen lawmakers have been the victims of deepfake pornography, with female lawmakers significantly more likely to be targeted, according to a new report released Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Apple Intelligence arrives for the UK, Australia, Canada, New Zealand with iOS 18.2
item.description: Apple has released iOS 18.2, iPadOS 18.2, and macOS Sequoia 15.2, which means local language access to Apple Intelligence is now available to iPhone, Mac, and iPad users in the UK, Australia, Canada, New Zealand.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Microsoft 365: A guide to the updates
item.description: Microsoft 365 (and Office 365) subscribers get more frequent software updates than those who have purchased Office without a subscription, which means subscribers have access to the latest features, security patches, and bug fixes.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Networking terms and definitions
item.description: To find a brief definition of the networking term you are looking for user your browser’s “Find” feature then follow links to a fuller explanation. AI networking AI networking refers to the application of artificial intelligence (AI) technologies to network management and optimization.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: About the Best Places to Work in IT
item.description: The 2025 honorees have been announced! See our Best Places to Work in IT 2025 special report for the complete list of honorees, major trends from this year’s survey, and much more.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Go eclipses Node.js in web API requests, Cloudflare reports
item.description: Go has surpassed Node.js as the most popular language used for making automated API requests, according to cloud provider Cloudflare’s annual review of internet trends.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Fortnite players 'tricked' into unwanted purchases are starting to get refunds. Here's how to apply
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — U.S. consumers who were “tricked” into purchases they didn't want from Fortnite maker Epic Games are now starting to receive refund checks, the Federal Trade Commission said this week.
item.dc:creator: WYATTE GRANTHAM-PHILIPS, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Setapp survey reveals what Mac developers are thinking about right now
item.description: Mac developers have a lot to think about as we close in on 2025, the eighth Mac developer survey from Setapp suggests.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Cato Networks brings IoT, OT support to SASE platform
item.description: Cato Networks today announced new capabilities for its cloud-based service access service edge (SASE) platform that will enable enterprise organizations to more easily manage and secure Internet of Things (IoT) and operational technology (OT) devices.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: China launches anti-monopoly probe into Nvidia amid rising US-China chip tensions
item.description: China has initiated an investigation into Nvidia over alleged violations of the country’s anti-monopoly laws, signaling a potential escalation in the ongoing tech and trade tensions between Beijing and Washington.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: California to consider requiring mental health warnings on social media sites
item.description: SACRAMENTO, Calif. (AP) — California, home to some of the largest technology companies in the world, would be the first U.S. state to require mental health warning labels on social media sites if lawmakers pass a bill introduced Monday.
item.dc:creator: TRÂN NGUYỄN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Extreme looks to tame complexity with AI-powered platform for network and security management
item.description: Extreme Networks is rolling out an AI-infused networking platform that aims to help enterprise customers integrate, manage and automate a broad range of network and security technologies.
item.dc:creator: Network World
